Accessibility / Structure & Headings / landmarks-accessibility-bookmarklets

Comprehensive landmark and accessibility checker

Run landmarks-accessibility-bookmarklets

Test run or drag to
bookmarklets bar to install

javascript:window.a11yLandmarks%3Fwindow.a11yLandmarks.run()%3A(%21function()%7Bvar%20e%3Ddocument.createElement(%22link%22)%3Be.rel%3D%22stylesheet%22%2Ce.type%3D%22text%2Fcss%22%2Ce.href%3D%22https%3A%2F%2Faccessibility-bookmarklets.org%2Fbuild%2Fstyles.css%22%2Cdocument.getElementsByTagName(%22head%22)%5B0%5D.appendChild(e)%3Bvar%20t%3Ddocument.createElement(%22script%22)%3Bt.type%3D%22text%2Fjavascript%22%2Ct.src%3D%22https%3A%2F%2Faccessibility-bookmarklets.org%2Fbuild%2Flandmarks.js%22%2Cdocument.getElementsByTagName(%22head%22)%5B0%5D.appendChild(t)%7D()%2Cconsole.log(%22%5CnSource%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Faccessibility-bookmarklets.org%5CnBookmarklet%20name%3A%20Landmarks%20accessibility-bookmarklets%20(WCAG%20SC%201.3.1)%5Cn%22))%3B
